Source: Power Apps Documentation
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-apps/
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Power Apps Documentation

Page last updated (ms.date): 2026-02-26
Document last updated: 2026-03-03

## Key Capabilities
- Canvas apps, model-driven apps, code apps
- Plan designer (AI-assisted)
- AI copilot: build apps through conversation, add Copilot control
- Overview of the new experience (preview) — "Vibe" coding
- Dataverse for data management
- Solutions for ALM
- Power BI integration, Azure Synapse Link, Teams integration

## Create and Design
- Try/Buy Power Apps
- Choose an app type
- Use the Plan designer
- Create canvas apps, model-driven apps, code apps
- AI copilot capabilities
- Dataverse tables, metadata, business logic, dataflows
- Solutions and ALM with pipelines

## Security & Governance
- Power Platform admin center
- Licensing management
- Security and governance controls

## Developer
- Dataverse developer guide
- Model-driven apps developer guide (client scripting, code components)
- Canvas apps developer guide (custom connectors, offline apps, components)

## Integration
- Power BI visualization
- Azure Synapse Link
- Teams embedding (canvas and model-driven)

## Best Practices
- Power Apps coding guidelines
- Collaborate and co-develop apps
